mapper.select: SELECT id, leave_code AS leaveCode, leave_name AS leaveName, default_days AS defaultDays, max_days AS maxDays, requires_proof AS requiresProof, can_transfer AS canTransfer, transfer_max_days AS transferMaxDays, valid_months AS validMonths, deduct_salary AS deductSalary, sort, status FROM oa_leave_type WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
